channel.title: Stealth on Budget Van Life Affiliate Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Stealth on Budget Van Life Affiliate Guide

item.title: Renogy 100W Slim Solar Panels Review: 3-Panel Stealth ProMaster Setup
item.description:
Renogy 100W Slim Solar Panels Review: 3-Panel Stealth ProMaster Setup
#

I lived full-time in a 2017 Dodge ProMaster 2500 for seven years, and roof solar was one of the most important systems I dialed in. My goal was not flashy max wattage. My goal was a stealth solar van setup that looked low profile, survived weather, and delivered consistent daily charging. This review covers a practical 3-panel Renogy 100W slim configuration and how it performs in real van use.
